description: In the present, Gideon Malick returns to his estate, meeting with his daughter Stephanie. She reveals that their mysterious 'guest'—the Inhuman founder of Hydra—has arrived and is gathering Hydra's inner circle. Malick is deeply unsettled by the guest’s presence and confides in Stephanie about his vision of death at the guest’s hands, but she dismisses his fears.

transcript.line: You've been holding out on me.
You didn't tell me he was a looker. I don't know what I expected, but tall and handsome were certainly not at the top of the list.
Wait. Who... Who... Who are you talking about?
A-Are you saying that he's here? Why?
He showed up earlier and asked me to gather the inner circle. They're on their way now.
Gideon. So glad you could join us.
I'm honored that you would visit our home. To what do we owe this pleasure?
